title: ipomoea mollis
intro: Ipomoea mollis, also known as Japanese morning glory or climbing moonflower, is a type of flowering vine native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels and reduce fever. The health benefits of Ipomoea mollis include its potential to improve digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and support cardiovascular health. Ipomoea mollis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
